title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: download, build and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally with a single CLI.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama’s REST API—chat, generate, pull, push, list models from Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for Ollama; chat, stream, embeddings, model management.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLM, chat or embeddings provider in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model manager, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper with history, syntax highlighting and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as inline Copilot suggestions and chat panel.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling options.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java SDK for Ollama providing synchronous/asynchronous APIs and Jakarta-RS client.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama REST API with friendly idiomatic methods and streaming.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Minimal Flask/React template to spin up a custom chatbot backed by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-embeddings
summary: Utility repo showing how to generate embeddings with Ollama models and store in vector DBs (Chroma, Weaviate).

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts on selected notes and insert generated text.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package for Ollama JavaScript client—install and chat with local models from Node or browsers.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official Python package providing sync and async clients for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that answers channel mentions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to local Ollama with session memory and markdown support.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app adding Ollama chat endpoints, admin UI and async task queue integration.
